text:
Prediction: No

Reasoning: The current visit record is overwhelmingly focused on severe, acute infectious processes (Abscess of mediastinum, Retropharyngeal abscess, Hemophilus influenzae infection, Edema of larynx, etc.). There is no explicit mention of any lipid abnormalities, hypercholesterolemia, hyperlipidemia, or any other condition related to lipid metabolism in the diagnoses or management plan. Therefore, there is no strong and explicit evidence to predict a future diagnosis of "Disorders of Lipid Metabolism."
